calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, OCT-11-2006: JOSEPH A. SACRAMENTO, ESQ. AND DAVID FORAN, ESQ. APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF; PROPERTY MANAGER MR. JUSTIN SISCO ALSO APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY LAURA CHIERA, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT MS. KIM A PERRIN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES ENTER INTO A WRITTEN AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DAY; SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD; COUNSEL SACRAMENTO TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT FOR FILING THE WRITTEN SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT/STIP. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING: PLNTF. FRANK LOUIE IS AWARDED JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF PREMISE LOCATED AT 1445-7th AVE., APT.#2, SF, CA 94122; DEFENDANT KIM A. PERRIN TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $6,116.09 FOR THE PERIOD OF JUN-01-06 TO OCT-31-2006; OF THAT AMOUNT, THE SUM OF $1,000.00 IS TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT FOR ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS; TOTAL AMOUNT OF $6,116.09 IS TO BE PAID TO THE PROPERTY MANAGER LOCATED AT 4444 GEARY BLVD., STE. 105, S.F., CA 94108; BY OCT-18-06 DEFENDANT TO PAY AMOUNT OF $3,116.09, REPRESENTING A PARTIAL PAYMENT OF THE THE TOTAL DUE; ON OR BEFORE NOV-01-06 & ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH AND EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER, DEF. PERRIN SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $1292.89, REPRESENTING THE CURRENT RENT OF $1042.89 & A PARTIAL PAYMENT OF $250.00; SAID PAYMENTS SHALL EXTEND THROUGH JUNE-01-2007;IF DEFENDANT MAKES ALL PAYMENTS, THE $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS WILL BE WAIVED & PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS THE ACTION; IF DEF. FAILS TO MAKE ANY PAYMENTS, PLNTF. MAY SUBMIT EX PARTE APPLICATION & SEEK IMMED. ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES & IMMED. EVICTION & MONEY JUDGMENT OF ALL AMOUNTS DUE & NO STAYS; DISMISSAL WILL ENTER INTO AFTER FIVE (5) COURT DAYS. DEF. PERRIN UNDERSTANDS & AGREES TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT THIS DAY; DEF.PERRIN RELEASES PLNTF. FRANK LOUIE FROM ALL CLAIMS.
PRO TEM JUDGE SANDRA MC NABB; REPORTER JOANNE BRYCE, #3789; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA(218/206)
